title: rubus × lamproleucus
intro: Rubus × lamproleucus, also known as hybrid raspberry, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Rubus and is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the American red raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus × lamproleucus include its ability to support heart health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
